name: edusphere-monorepo
description: Root launcher for the EDDDUSPHERE microservices + frontend. `npm run dev` boots everything in one terminal.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "AUTH,COURSES,TEACHERS,PROGRESS,GATEWAY,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue,white" "cd backend/auth_login && npm run dev" "cd backend/courses-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/teachers-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/progress-tracker && npm start" "cd gateway && npm start" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "AUTH,COURSES,TEACHERS,PROGRESS,GATEWAY" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue" "cd backend/auth_login && npm run dev" "cd backend/courses-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/teachers-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/progress-tracker && npm start" "cd gateway && npm start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend/auth_login install && npm --prefix backend/courses-service install && npm --prefix backend/teachers-service install && npm --prefix backend/progress-tracker install && npm --prefix gateway install && npm --prefix client install
